title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Geodis India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Geodis India
jsonLd.description:
Geodis India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Hyderabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Geodis India:
Geodis India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in 3PL Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Geodis India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
